parameters.jsCode:
const shipments = $input.all().map(item => item.json);
const params = $('Parse Query').first().json;

const formattedShipments = shipments.map(s => ({
  id: s.id,
  tokenCode: s.token_code,
  fromAddress: s.from_address,
  toAddress: s.to_address,
  weight: parseFloat(s.weight),
  status: s.status,
  quoteAmount: s.quote_amount ? parseFloat(s.quote_amount) : null,
  trackingNumber: s.tracking_number,
  trackingStatus: s.tracking_status,
  carrier: s.carrier,
  serviceName: s.service_name,
  estimatedDays: s.estimated_days,
  labelUrl: s.label_url,
  trackingUrl: s.tracking_url,
  createdAt: s.created_at,
  updatedAt: s.updated_at
}));

return {
  success: true,
  data: formattedShipments,
  count: formattedShipments.length,
  limit: params.limit,
  offset: params.offset
};
